name: @forgeax/app-learn-render-5-advanced-lighting-6-hdr
description: learn-render LearnOpenGL section 5.advanced-lighting 6.hdr — HDR rendering with two custom RenderPipeline modes (LO exposure tonemap / passthrough) hot-swapped via keyboard.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime size already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: OOS-11 fps anchor stays on hello-triangle; per-app fps drift is not gated for learn-render examples

bench.reason: pixel-parity bench drives parity-forgeax vs parity-threejs; learn-render entries land as bench:pixel-parity placeholders only

gate.reason: placeholder smoke script; structural-only smoke (>=300 frames, onError=0)

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; LearnOpenGL section-5.6 HDR tutorial example
